task: Safe-additive Block 9 — RLS coverage audit (docs-only, GUARD #33 / Wave-5 Block N). docs/specs/RLS-COVERAGE-AUDIT.md: read-only inventory of tenant-scoped tables (operating_company_id) and whether each enforces an RLS policy keyed on the tenant.
